prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211工程、双一流建设高校；软科主榜排名约第120名（2026年），近年排名在116–122之间波动，整体稳定；该校在近年 声誉监测中未出现明显负面舆情，抖音热度评价为"一般"（总排名第95），短视频平台关注度不高；无投档断档记录，报考心理平稳；第五轮学科评估中食品科 学与工程获评A-，为该校唯一A类学科，与招生专业中的食品科学与工程类直接对应，对相关专业报考有一定吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电气类、电子信息类等 工科专业社会热度持续偏高，但该校农林特色鲜明，相关专业热度一般；本省2026年物理类考生估算约20.6万人，与2025年（20.7万）基本持平，竞争压力未明显变化；该校位于黑龙江省哈尔滨市，距贵州较远，属跨省招生；地域偏好对贵州考生报考意愿有一定抑制作用。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次 持续后移趋势、2026年计划小幅扩招（+3.9%）、本省考生数基本持平、学校声誉平稳等因素，在2025年基准54074名基础上，预计位次继续后移；预测最低位次约55536名，区间5 5036–56036名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text:
From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category (including Science) were 35017 → 37233 → 44725 → 41769 → 54074, showing a continuous backward trend overall, with a cumulative backward shift of approximately 12349 places in the last 3 years; the 2025 baseline is approximately 54074.
2. 【Enrollment Plan】The provincial Physics Category plan was 178 in 2021, 181 in 2022, 171 in 2023, 184 in 2024, and 180 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 187, an increase of 7 students (+3.9%) compared to 2025, with a limited expansion that has little effect on alleviating competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university; ranked approximately 120th on the Soft Science Main Ranking (2026), with rankings fluctuating between 116 and 122 in recent years, overall stable; no significant negative public opinion has appeared in recent reputation monitoring, with Douyin heat evaluation as "average" (overall ranking 95th), and low attention on short video platforms; no record of enrollment gaps, stable application psychology; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Food Science and Engineering received an A- rating, the only A-class discipline of the university, directly corresponding to the Food Science and Engineering category in enrollment majors, which has some appeal for related major applications.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors such as Computer, Electrical, and Electronic Information continue to have high social popularity, but the university's agricultural and forestry characteristics are prominent, with related majors having average popularity; the estimated number of Physics Category examinees in the province for 2026 is about 206,000, basically the same as 2025 (207,000), with no significant change in competitive pressure; the university is located in Harbin, Heilongjiang Province, far from Guizhou, making it a cross-provincial enrollment; regional preference has some inhibitory effect on the willingness of Guizhou examinees to apply.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the continuous backward trend of historical rankings, the small expansion of the 2026 plan (+3.9%), the basically unchanged number of provincial examinees, and stable school reputation, the ranking is expected to continue shifting backward from the 2025 baseline of 54074; the predicted minimum ranking is approximately 55536, with a range of 55036–56036.

If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 54000), you can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 flagship majors; if your ranking is close to the upper limit, prioritize Tier 2 advantageous majors such as Food Science and Engineering Category (A- discipline).

prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次波动趋势、2026年计划缩招（-6.5%）、本省历史类考生增加约3%等因素，在2025年基准6651名基础上，预计位次略有前 移（竞争加剧、位次数字减小）；预测最低位次约6544名，区间6044–7044名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for History Category (including Liberal Arts) were 5375 → 5019 → 10534 → 6793 → 6651, with significant fluctuations; after a notable decline in 2023, rankings have rebounded in the past two years; the baseline for 2025 is approximately 6651; provincial History Category enrollment plans were 25 in 2021, 25 in 2022, 35 in 2023, 26 in 2024, and 31 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 29, a reduction of 2 (-6.5%) compared to 2025, slightly intensifying competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: The university has not experienced significant negative public opinion in recent reputation monitoring; its Douyin heat evaluation is 'average'; there are no records of admission cut-off gaps, indicating stable application psychology; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Food Science and Engineering was rated A-, but the History Category enrollment majors (Law, Administrative Management, International Chinese Education, Finance, Business Administration, Landscape Architecture, etc.) have low correlation with the university's A-level disciplines; it is a Project 211 and Double First-Class university; its Soft Science main ranking is approximately 120th (2026), with stable rankings in recent years.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Law is socially popular (recommended), Finance is polarized and wait-and-see, Business Administration is clearly discouraged; the estimated number of History Category examinees in the province for 2026 is about 93,000, an increase of approximately 3% from 2025 (90,000), slightly intensifying competition; the university is located in Harbin, Heilongjiang Province, far from Guizhou, making it a cross-provincial enrollment; regional preferences have a certain inhibitory effect on Guizhou examinees' willingness to apply.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the fluctuation trend of historical rankings, the 2026 enrollment plan reduction (-6.5%), and the increase of about 3% in provincial History Category examinees, based on the 2025 baseline of 6651, the ranking is expected to move slightly forward (intensified competition, smaller ranking number); the predicted minimum ranking is approximately 6544, with a range of 6044–7044.

Rankings significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 6000) can focus on reaching for Tier 1 majors; rankings close to the upper limit should prioritize relatively popular majors in Tier 2, such as Finance.
